question: Return a table comparing promo versus no-promo orders, with columns promo_bucket, orders, net_revenue, and avg_order_net_value.
sql_query:
WITH per_order AS (
    SELECT
        o.order_id,
        COALESCE(p.total_payments, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_refunds, 0) AS net_revenue,
        pr.promo_bucket
    FROM core.orders o
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT order_id, SUM(payment_value) AS total_payments
        FROM core.payments
        GROUP BY order_id
    ) p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT oi.order_id, SUM(refund_amount) AS total_refunds
        FROM core.returns r
        JOIN core.order_items oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id
        GROUP BY oi.order_id
    ) r ON o.order_id = r.order_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT o.order_id,
               CASE WHEN MAX(oi.discount_amount) > 0 THEN 'Promo' ELSE 'No Promo' END AS promo_bucket
        FROM core.orders o
        JOIN core.order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
        GROUP BY o.order_id
    ) pr ON o.order_id = pr.order_id
)
SELECT
    promo_bucket,
    COUNT(order_id) AS orders,
    ROUND(SUM(net_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS net_revenue,
    ROUND(AVG(net_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS avg_order_net_value
FROM per_order
GROUP BY promo_bucket
ORDER BY promo_bucket
pandas_sql_query: WITH order_promo_flags AS (SELECT order_id, MAX(CASE WHEN promo_id <> 'NO_PROMO' OR COALESCE(promo_id_2, '') NOT IN ('', 'NO_PROMO') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_promo FROM order_items GROUP BY 1), order_net_values AS (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity * unit_price - discount_amount) AS order_net_value FROM order_items GROUP BY 1) SELECT CASE WHEN p.used_promo = 1 THEN 'used_promo' ELSE 'no_promo' END AS promo_bucket, COUNT(*) AS orders, ROUND(SUM(v.order_net_value), 2) AS net_revenue, ROUND(AVG(v.order_net_value), 2) AS avg_order_net_value FROM order_promo_flags p JOIN order_net_values v USING (order_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY orders DESC, promo_bucket
diff_preview: At positional index 0, first diff: no_promo != No Promo
unordered_diff_preview: At positional index 0, first diff: no_promo != No Promo
